other.name: Lord of Excess
other.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly SLAANESH INFANTRY units, this model has the Lone Operative ability. Excessive Vigour (Aura): While a friendly SLAANESH unit is within 6" of this model, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1. Ecstatic Death: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. This model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

composition.equipment: equipped with: infernal cannon; hellforged weapons.

datasheets.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

other.name: Daemonic Destruction
other.description: Each time this model ends a Charge move , select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each of this model’s remaining wounds: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). Stimulated by Pain: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

models: 1 Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings
composition.equipment: equipped with: infernal cannon; hellforged weapons.

model_definitions.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

other.name: Daemonic Poisons
other.description: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase , after this model has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is poisoned. At the start of each player’s Command phase , roll one D6 for each poisoned enemy unit on the battlefield: on a 4+,that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds . Daemon Primarch of Slaanesh: At the start of your opponent’s Command phase , select one of the abilities in the Daemon Primarch of Slaanesh section. Until the start of your opponent’s next Command phase, this model has that ability. Serpentine: Each time this model makes a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move , it can move over sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height.

abilities.damaged_description: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .

composition.equipment: equipped with: malefic lash; daemonic blades; serpentine tail.

datasheets.name: Keeper of Secrets
datasheets.lore: Darkly intelligent, horribly beguiling and deadly in battle, the Keepers of Secrets are the greatest champions of Slaaneshi daemon legions. Wielding unclean yet beautiful weapons and unleashing the sorcerous powers of obsession and torment, these daemons cut an elegantly hideous swathe across the battlefield.

other.name: Daemon Lord of Slaanesh (Aura)
other.description: While a friendly LEGIONS OF EXCESS unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1. Mesmerising Form: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .

other.name: Shining Aegis
other.description: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+.

abilities.damaged_description: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .

composition.equipment: equipped with: Phantasmagoria; snapping claws; witstealer sword.

wargear_options.raw: This model can be equipped with one of the following: living whip ritual knife shining aegis

other.name: Perfectionists
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Euphoric Strikes: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase , this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

composition.equipment: equipped with: bolt pistol; plasma pistol; Phoenix power spear; close combat weapon.

wargear_options.raw: This model’s plasma pistol can be replaced with one of the following: 1 power fist 1 rapture lash
This model’s Phoenix power spear can be replaced with one of the following: 1 master-crafted power sword 1 screamer pistol

other.name: Obsessive Annunciation
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Doom Siren: In your Shooting phase , after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks and roll three D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound . If an enemy unit suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of this ability, it must take a Battle-shock test .

composition.equipment: equipped with: screamer pistol; power sword.

wargear_options.raw: This model’s power sword can be replaced with 1 screamer pistol and 1 close combat weapon.
choices: screamer pistol and 1 close combat weapon

other.name: A Challenge Worthy of Skill
other.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER , MONSTER or WALKER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll . Duellist’s Hubris: At the start of the Fight phase ; if this model is not leading a unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Fights First ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Blade of the Laer; Lash of Torment.

datasheets.name: Shalaxi Helbane
datasheets.lore: Cloven hooves pounding against broken earth, Shalaxi Helbane bears down upon its doomed quarry with the Soulpiercer gleaming in its grip. No prey can evade the Monarch of the Hunt, for the daemon’s obsession with its victim is so singular and so powerful that no mortal means of flight could ever escape it.

other.name: No Prey Can Evade
other.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model. Monarch of the Hunt: At the start of the first battle round , select one enemy unit to be this model’s quarry. Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets its quarry, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll . Each time this model’s quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model’s quarry.

abilities.damaged_description: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .

composition.equipment: equipped with: lash of Slaanesh; Pavane of Slaanesh; snapping claws; Soulpiercer.

other.name: Warped Interference (Psychic)
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in it have the Benefit of Cover against that attack. Wracking Agonies (Psychic): In your Shooting phase , after this model has shot, select one INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Agonising Energies. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is wracked with agonies. While a unit is wracked with agonies, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Agonising Energies; bolt pistol; force weapon.

datasheets.name: Daemonettes
datasheets.lore: Known to mortals as the handmaidens of Slaanesh, these daemons are a mixture of the beautiful and the monstrous, made all the more disturbing by the visceral clash of both. They delight in the carnage of battle, weaving around enemies’ clumsy blows as they shrill and sigh their delight amidst swift-taloned slaughter.

other.name: Horrifying Beauty
other.description: At the start of the Fight phase , each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle-shock test , subtracting 1 from the result if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength .

other.name: Daemonic Icon
other.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

other.name: Instrument of Chaos
other.description: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: slashing claws.

wargear_options.raw: 1 Daemonette that is not equipped with a daemonic icon can be equipped with 1 instrument of Chaos.
wargear_options.model_name: Daemonette that is not equipped with a daemonic icon

wargear_options.raw: 1 Daemonette that is not equipped with an instrument of Chaos can be equipped with 1 daemonic icon.
wargear_options.model_name: Daemonette that is not equipped with an instrument of Chaos

other.name: Excessive Assault
other.description: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker , you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

other.name: Icon of Excess
other.description: At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase , if the bearer’s unit destroyed one or more enemy units that phase, the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test . If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

composition.equipment: equipped with: bolt pistol; power sword. Every Infractor is equipped with: bolt pistol; duelling sabre.

wargear_options.raw: The Obsessionist’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.
The Obsessionist’s power sword can be replaced with 1 rapture lash.
1 Infractor can be equipped with 1 icon of excess.

other.name: Objective Defiled
other.description: At the end of your Command phase , if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

other.name: Icon of Excess
other.description: At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase , if the bearer’s unit destroyed one or more enemy units that phase, the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test . If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

composition.equipment: equipped with: bolt pistol; power sword. Every Tormentor is equipped with: boltgun; close combat weapon.

wargear_options.raw: The Obsessionist’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.
The Obsessionist’s power sword can be replaced with 1 rapture lash.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Tormentor’s boltgun can be replaced with 1 meltagun.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Tormentor’s boltgun can be replaced with 1 plasma gun.
1 Tormentor can be equipped with 1 icon of excess.

other.name: Assault Vehicle
other.description: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced . Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

composition.equipment: equipped with: combi-bolter; armoured tracks.

wargear_options.raw: This model can be equipped with one of the following: 1 combi-bolter 1 combi-weapon
This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher or can replace 1 combi-bolter with 1 havoc launcher.
choices: havoc launcher or can replace 1 combi-bolter with 1 havoc launcher

other.name: Assault Ramp
other.description: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move , that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.damaged_description: This model has a transport capacity of 14 EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY models. Each TERMINATOR and FLAWLESS BLADE model takes up the space of 2 models.

composition.equipment: equipped with: 2 soulshatter lascannons; twin heavy bolter; armoured tracks.

wargear_options.raw: This model can be equipped with one of the following: 1 combi-bolter 1 combi-weapon
This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher.

other.name: Scuttling Horrors
other.description: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

composition.equipment: equipped with: hideous mutations.

other.name: Lethal Obsession
other.description: In your Shooting phase , each time this unit is selected to shoot, if it makes one or more ranged attacks and all of those attacks target the same enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time this unit declares a charge , if that enemy unit is a target of that charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll .

composition.equipment: equipped with: combi-bolter; accursed weapon.

wargear_options.raw: 1 Chaos Terminator’s combi-bolter can be replaced with one of the following: 1 heavy flamer 1 reaper autocannon
Any number of models can each have their combi-bolter replaced with 1 combi-weapon.
1 model’s combi-bolter and accursed weapon can be replaced with 1 paired accursed weapons.
Up to 3 models can each have their accursed weapon replaced with 1 power fist.
1 model’s accursed weapon can be replaced with 1 chainfist.

datasheets.name: Fiends
datasheets.lore: Few daemonic entities approach the sheer disturbing horror of the Fiends of Slaanesh. Malicious hunting beasts that croon their delight across the battlefield, these ghastly abominations are wreathed in a soporific musk that leaves their prey witless and helpless before their flashing talons and stabbing tails.

other.name: Soporific Musk
other.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back , models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests . When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked , subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

composition.equipment: equipped with: barbed tail and dissecting claws.

other.name: Daemonic Patrons
other.description: Each time this unit is selected to fight, it can call upon daemonic patrons. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, an unmodified Wound roll of 3+ scores a Critical Wound . At the end of the Fight phase , if this unit called upon daemonic patrons this phase and no enemy models were destroyed by attacks made by models in this unit this phase, one model in this unit is destroyed.

composition.equipment: equipped with: bolt pistol; blissblade.

other.name: Airborne Predator
other.description: Each time this model ends a Normal move , you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move and roll two D6, adding 1 to each result if that enemy unit can FLY : for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds .

abilities.damaged_description: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .

composition.equipment: equipped with: Hades autocannon; Heldrake claws.

wargear_options.raw: This model’s Hades autocannon can be replaced with 1 baleflamer.

datasheets.name: Maulerfiend
datasheets.lore: Maulerfiends stalk the battlefield like immense hunting beasts. Once the enemy are in sight, these huge Daemon Engines thunder forward, even scaling defensive walls in their eagerness to get at the prey. Once amongst the foe, they slaughter anything in reach with their huge talons, crushing jaws and stabbing tendrils.

other.name: Glutton for Punishment
other.description: Each time this model makes an attack, if it is below its Starting Strength , add 1 to the Hit roll . If this model is also Below Half-strength , add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.damaged_description: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .

composition.equipment: equipped with: lasher tendrils; Maulerfiend fists.

wargear_options.raw: This model’s lasher tendrils can be replaced with 2 magma cutters.

datasheets.name: Noise Marines
datasheets.lore: Orchestrating riotous destruction on vast scales, Noise Marines saturate the war zone with explosive bolts, clashing aural waves and extreme psychosonic attacks. These hedonistic worshippers of Slaanesh are inured to most stimuli, and seek to unleash the most cacophonous destruction to stir their jaded senses.

other.name: Terrifying Crescendo
other.description: In your Shooting phase , after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

composition.equipment: equipped with: sonic blaster; close combat weapon.

wargear_options.raw: The Disharmonist’s sonic blaster can be replaced with 1 screamer pistol and 1 power sword.

datasheets.name: Seekers
datasheets.lore: Sat astride swift Steeds of Slaanesh, Seekers pursue their mortal prey with obsessive delight. Even the fastest of mortal vehicles cannot outpace these vicious entities, while those who stand and fight soon find their ranks smashed asunder by charging shock cavalry drawn from the darkest depths of nightmare.

other.name: Unholy Speed
other.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

other.name: Daemonic Icon
other.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

other.name: Instrument of Chaos
other.description: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: lashing tongue; slashing claws.

wargear_options.raw: 1 Seeker that is not equipped with a daemonic icon can be equipped with 1 instrument of Chaos.
wargear_options.model_name: Seeker that is not equipped with a daemonic icon

wargear_options.raw: 1 Seeker that is not equipped with an instrument of Chaos can be equipped with 1 daemonic icon.
